welcome.title: Welcome to Menura
welcome.subtitle: Your offline app to plan meals and shopping.
welcome.note: A clear, practical app with no complications.

week.title: Plan stress-free
week.subtitle: Your full week in a single view.
week.note: Perfect to build routine and meal prep.

recipes.title: Recipes you'll use
recipes.subtitle: Your recipe area, clear and organized.
bullets: Create your own recipes with ingredients and steps.
Add quick meals with only a name in seconds.
Search and filter by meal type or diet (vegan, keto, vegetarian and more).
recipes.note: Everything in one place, no complications.

grocery.title: Shop with real order
grocery.subtitle: Category list and editable checklist.
bullets: Create your shopping list for any week.
Add manual products with category and quantity.
Mark items as bought and keep everything updated.

premium.title: Scale at your pace
premium.subtitle: Clear Free and Premium, ad-free.
bullets: Everything works offline, your data stays on your device.
Upgrade to Premium anytime to plan without limits.
premium.note: You decide how much to organize, with no ads or interruptions.

recipeList.title: Recipes
recipeList.subtitle: Plan faster with your catalog.
recipeList.deleteMessage: "{{title}}" will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

recipeDetail.customPhotoFallback: Custom recipes do not save a photo yet, but your recipe is intact.
recipeDetail.photoFallback: This recipe had no photo attached; we show a clear state so nothing looks broken.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Your saved recipes one tap away.

grocery.title: Shopping list
grocery.emptySubtitle: Or generate automatically from your recipes
grocery.autoSaveNote: It is saved automatically to this week's list.

slotAction.title: Edit meal
slotAction.subtitle: Assign recipe, manual text or clear this slot.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Menura experience and preferences

premium.free2: ✔ Shopping list only for that active week
premium.premium2: ✔ Generate shopping list for any week

paywall.title: Premium
paywall.subtitle: Unlock unlimited weeks, recipes and shopping list items.
paywall.feature3: Custom date range in the weekly view
paywall.disclosureLine1: Monthly plan: {{price}} per month, auto-renews until canceled.
paywall.disclosureLine2: You can cancel anytime from Google Play > Subscriptions. Access continues until current period ends.
paywall.disclosureLine3: The premium lifetime purchase does not auto-renew and keeps premium access while the purchase remains active on your account.
paywall.pending: Your purchase is pending confirmation from Google Play. Access will activate once it is processed.
paywall.unavailable: Purchases are not available right now. Check your internet connection and that your Google Play account is set up.
paywall.webOnlyNote: In-app purchases are only available in the Android app. Download Menura from Google Play to subscribe or buy Premium.

members.title: Household members
members.subtitle: Create profiles so each person can have their own meal in the plan: useful when the baby eats different food, or when separating school snacks.
members.empty: No members yet. Meals are assigned to 'Everyone' by default.
members.removeWarning: This member and the slots assigned to them will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

share.title: Share list
share.subtitle: Send the list via WhatsApp, email or share the QR with your partner.
share.qrHint: Scan with the camera to read the list as text.
share.qrTruncated: The QR shows part of the text because the list is long. Use the share button to send the full version.
share.empty: Your list is empty. Add ingredients or manual products.
